route.description: `none` when there are no args to route on (skill: no-args / browser path); otherwise `issue`, `title_substring`, or a registry key (e.g. close, setup-github)

reference.description: from registry when route is a registry key; omitted if null

flags.description: contains only the flags that were explicitly provided in the invocation

item_ref.description: Backlog item reference `#N` when input is `#N` or bare digits; full GitHub issue URL when input is a URL; omitted if absent

user_text.description: any remaining positional arguments joined by a space, or the entire freetext suffix if a delimiter was used; omitted if null/empty
